channel.title: 2026-04-16 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-16 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Asymmetry Control in a Parametric Oscillator for the Quantum Simulation of Chemical Activation
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Alejandro Cros Carrillo de Albornoz, Rodrigo G. Cortiñas, Max Schäfer, Nicholas E. Frattini, Brandon Allen, Delmar G.A. Cabral, Pablo E. Videla, Pouya Khazaei, Eitan Geva, Victor S. Batista, and Michel H. Devoret
Author(s): Alejandro Cros Carrillo de Albornoz, Rodrigo G. Cortiñas, Max Schäfer, Nicholas E. Frattini, Brandon Allen, Delmar G.A. Cabral, Pablo E. Videla, Pouya Khazaei, Eitan Geva, Victor S. Batista, and Michel H. Devoret A continuously driven Kerr parametric oscillator simulates a dissipative quantum system with applications to reactions in quantum chemistry. [PRX Quantum 7, 020309] Published Thu Apr 16, 2026
